scenarios.name: Type-safe createProject server action with Zod and auth middleware
scenarios.rationale: Baseline hand-rolls FormData + safeParse and an inline session check, missing the action client and revalidatePath; treatment builds an authAction with middleware returning ctx.user, chains .schema().action({ parsedInput, ctx }), and calls revalidatePath.

scenarios.name: Edit form using next-safe-action hooks with validation and isExecuting state
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for useTransition and a custom errors state and never imports the library hook; treatment uses useAction from next-safe-action/hooks, renders result.validationErrors and result.serverError, and gates the submit button on isExecuting.
